Our Story

Rooted in the
soul of Kerala

Ella Homestay was born from a love for the quiet hills of Peermade — a place where the pace of life slows to match the drift of morning fog through tea estates.

Inspired by Kerala's classic nalukettu tradition, our property is a living tribute to the warmth and craft of the region. Every corner carries intention: coconut wood textures, traditional lamp glow, the fragrance of the mountains at dusk.

Nestled between Kuttikanam and Wagamon at 900 metres, we offer three carefully designed rooms, home-cooked Kerala meals, and the kind of hospitality that makes guests return year after year.

One home.

When you book Ella Homestay, you get the entire property — all 3 rooms, the kitchen, the garden, the firepit. No strangers. No shared spaces. Just your people and the hills.

Transparent Pricing

We don't hide
our prices.

We are travellers who turned hosts. We know what it feels like to plan a trip on a budget — which is why our pricing is always clear, always fair, and always includes the whole home.

Experiences

The hills have
much to offer

01
🥾

Nature Trekking

Wind through lush tea estates and forest trails with our guided treks. Available on request for all fitness levels.

02
🔥

Fire Camp Nights

Gather beneath a sky full of stars around an open fire. The unmistakable heart of an Ella evening.

03
🏕️

Camp Stay

Sleep in the open air in our scenic backyard. For those who want the hills completely unfiltered.

04
🌅

Sunrise Views

Wake before the world does. Wagamon's sunrise — mist parting to reveal gold-lit mountains — is something you carry home.
